arts.ttl: Europa League Preview: Athletic Bilbao vs Roma – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao and Roma renew hostilities in the Europa League for the third time this season, but first at Estadio San Mames. A quarter-final berth is within touching distance for the Italian side after a dramatic 2-1 first-leg win at the Stadio Olimpico last week. The post Europa League Preview: Athletic Bilbao vs Roma – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Roma XI vs Athletic Bilbao – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Roma travel to Athletic Bilbao in the Europa League tonight protecting a narrow advantage. Claudio Ranieri’s side snatched a stoppage-time winner at the Stadio Olimpico last week, to take the lead heading into tonight’s tie. The Italians have reached at least the semi-finals of this competition in three of the last four seasons. arts.ttl: Recent Events Might Allude to Roma Appointing Sarri
arts.sum: The part of the Roma hierarchy that would like a veteran to succeed Claudio Ranieri, including the current coach himself, is gaining the upper hand, and Maurizio Sarri would be a strong fit for the squad. The present boss’ influence is rapidly increasing. The post Recent Events Might Allude to Roma Appointing Sarri appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
